<div align="center">
    <h2>• warning •</h2>
</div>


These dots are based on **illogical-impulse**. You can access original **illogical-impulse** dots from [here](https://github.com/end-4/dots-hyprland)

This dots contains my tweaks to original illogical-impulse dots. It's mostly up to date with original dots and my daily driver. However there may be bugs and stability issues. Use [Github Issues](https://github.com/djOB2EOTWQW1/ii-eve/issues) for real issue though.

**P.S.** Before you say anything — better don't. This setup is just for me. I don’t care about complaints :d

<div align="center">
    <h2>• installation •</h2>
</div>


1. Clone this repository like this:

```
git clone https://github.com/djOB2EOTWQW1/ii-eve.git --recurse-submodules
```

2. Run the setup script and follow the instructions:

```
./setup-ii-eve.sh
```

Tip: You can see all flags with `--help`:
```
./setup-ii-eve.sh --help
```


<div align="center">
    <h2>• updating •</h2>
</div>

Run the setup script:

```bash
./setup-ii-eve.sh
```

Run the cli (if it's installed):
  
```bash
eve update
```

Use the update button:

 <img width="445" height="202" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d1420a5b-4d38-4bbe-9ee1-af71f01cd91d" />
